title: Gold edges higher ahead of tariff announcement
section_path: Gold edges higher ahead of tariff announcement
section_path_text: Gold edges higher ahead of tariff announcement
summary:
Main
Commodity markets remained on edge ahead of the announcement of US tariffs. A weaker USD provided some support, as did ongoing supply side issues. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-04-03 111656.png | assets/2025-04-03_gold-edges-higher-ahead-of-tariff-announcement_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_a666873683e3.png

Market Commentary
Gold edged higher as traders awaited the release of US President Trump's reciprocal tariffs.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Commodity markets remained on edge ahead of the announcement of US tariffs. A weaker USD provided some support, as did ongoing supply side issues.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Gold edged higher as traders awaited the release of US President Trump's reciprocal tariffs. The pending announcement has driven safe haven buying in the precious metal.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Inflows into gold-backed ETFs have picked up sharply in recent weeks amid uncertainty around global growth as the Trump administration implements its trade policy. However, total holdings remain well below levels seen during the early stages of the pandemic.
